new_feature_requests: OpenAI Agents SDK comparison - evaluating Managed Agents as alternative

top_priority.title: No built-in UI - developers flying blind
why: Multiple developers building third-party UIs (Posse) because the API has no visual interface
Comment explicitly states the API is powerful but without a UI you are flying blind
This is the #1 friction pattern in week 1 - developers want observability into agent sessions
top_priority.metric: 3 of 4 friction posts mention lack of UI or observability tools
top_priority.roi_estimate: A first-party agent session viewer would reduce onboarding friction and give Managed Agents a visual selling point vs competing SDKs

secondary_priorities.title: Competitive displacement anxiety from startups
why: Startup founder explicitly asking if Managed Agents is a death sentence for their business
AWS-ifying criticism suggests developers see bundling too aggressively
19-provider sandbox comparison triggered by the launch shows competitive landscape is crowded
secondary_priorities.metric: 2 posts express concern about competing with the ecosystem
secondary_priorities.roi_estimate: Clear partner/ecosystem messaging would reduce developer anxiety and prevent churn of builders who feel threatened

secondary_priorities.title: Strong launch momentum - capitalize on the attention window
why: Main launch post hit 169 points with 86 comments - strong signal for dev tools
Overview post got 40 points with 24 comments - sustained interest beyond day 1
Multiple developers already building on top (open source alternatives, compliance layers, UIs)
secondary_priorities.metric: 45% of posts are momentum/positive - healthy ratio for a week-1 launch
secondary_priorities.roi_estimate: Investing in developer tutorials and content now would capitalize on the attention window before it fades
